title: Starry Skies Modpack
description: A new take on the modded & modern Minecraft adventure! Featuring tons of cool mods, niche and popular, such as Lunar, Stellarity, and much more!
body:
![The logo of the mod. It reads "Starry (red star) Skies". There is a shooting star bouncing across the title.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/608683b6a2070ca71243800ade81935b54135b25.png)

This is the official Page of the Starry Skies ModPack!

This is the

![The subtitle/edition of the pack. It reads "Standard Edition".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a293be91239d95ecdf8ffbc7099c18efa658207.png)

The Starry Skies Modpack is an adventure-based Modpack comprised of both popular and niche mods. It aims to encourages exploring every nook and cranny by adding custom dimensions, overhauling existing ones, and adding tons of new items and structures!

Built from the heart of an adventurer, you find yourself in a strange new land. The hills? Hillier. The Caverns? Deeper than ever before. Explore the overworld to your heart's content, interacting with the lunar phases (Lunar), exploring the crawling sculk city (Deeper & Darker, Hallucinate, SVC Interactions). The surface changes with time, so planned farming is key (Seasons)!

![This is the "Seasons" image, from the gallery. It shows the overworld during the Winter season.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b14edbaff61ccb14d9c4eae087b63d9f9c329e2d.png)

Dive deeper, and find a reimagined Nether, redone by Incendium. Explore the new Sculk Dimension in Deeper and Darker, in search of the new Warden Armor. Explore what's left of the reborn End in Stellarity. The adventure almost never ends!

![This is the "Deeper and Darker" image from the gallery. It shows the new Sculk Dimension added by the titular mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ec044c157d95b6db7791275cbd6240c27d31a1.png)

We also have tons of mods, ranging from QOL and Tweaks, all the way up to the big stuff like a new weather system (Enhanced Weather) and Infinite Caves (Infinity Cave)! We even got those optimization mods, Sodium and Lithium, so almost anyone can run this!

![This is the "Infinity Cave" image, from the gallery. It shows the Magma Cave biome added beneath Y -64.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25009bace3c015640b8f36bdf41bbbdc9ee25821.png)

Looking for a new way to experience this game, with all the modern features and more? Look no further!

This pack was created for 1.20.1 specifically. There is no promise of a newer or older edition receiving a pack/build. This pack needs to be installed on both the Client and Server to function. Runs solely on Fabric 1.20.1. Quests not available until future notice.

"Will you play the game, or will it play you?"

Short trailer coming soon (WIP)

Credits & Mod List in download (Pack Credits.txt) :]
Part of the credits:
[Public Documentation w/ Mod Links](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1d2G0AjtHNdFJ3ZaiHn0GCYzDiLfrRq7CquirhGTlR-w/edit?usp=sharing)

Need help? Join the discord, linked to this page.

If you have a mental condition that is aggrevated by paranoia-like visuals & sounds, consider uninstalling "Hallucinate" before running this pack.
